calendar.matters:
Motion To Strike Petitioners Request For Appellate Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Richard Gullen; 408-261-4252; Rossi, Hamerslough, Reischl & Chuck; counsel for petitioner apppearing via Zoom.
Salem Mansoir; respondent/appellant; appearing in pro per via Zoom.

Mr. Mansoir contests the courts tentative ruling. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT SALEM MANSOIR ALSO KNOWN AS SALIM D. MANSOIR. ALSO KNOWN AS SALIM DONALD MANSOIR, AN INDIVIDUAL Motion To Strike Petitioners Request For Appellate Attorneys Fees is DENIED. Petitioner is entitled to attorney's fees on appeal. Motion to Strike Costs is untimely and is not supported by any argument or authority.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F, Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees On Appeal
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Richard Gullen; 408-261-4252; Rossi, Hamerslough, Reischl & Chuck; counsel for petitioner apppearing via Zoom.
Salem Mansoir; respondent/appellant; appearing in pro per via Zoom.

Mr. Mansoir contests the courts tentative ruling. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
